summary: A Fox News LIVE segment in which Deputy ICE Director Madison Sheahan appears in a remote interview box. She speaks about ICE targeting 'the worst of the worst' in Chicago and criticizes Gov. Pritzker, with Fox chyrons about Pritzker and 'authoritarian regime.' The segment is a cable-news interview clip with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; PRITZKER IMPLIES STATE ATTYS INVESTIGATING I.C.E.; PRITZKER: TRUMP MOVING TO 'AUTHORITARIAN REGIME'; Madison Sheahan, Deputy I.C.E. Director
